feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: chameleon
entry.content: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entry.title: build-tooling
entry.content: JavaScript build tooling — Bun, Vite, and library bundlers (tsdown/Rolldown, esbuild).

entry.title: headspin-control
entry.content: HeadSpin device control for Claude Code: skills, slash commands, subagents, hooks, and a bundled MCP server. Authenticate to a HeadSpin environment, enumerate and lock real devices, drive them over documented REST/Appium surfaces, run automated exploration, and produce standardized bug reports. Validated against ui-dev.headspin.io for the 2026-07-02 session (see e2e-evidence/headspin-cook-260702/).

entry.title: claude-flow
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: claude-flow
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: claude-flow
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: kshana
entry.content: Run the validated Kshana PNT-resilience engine from an AI agent — SGP4/SDP4, IAU frames, GNSS availability/DOP/ARAIM, Allan/MTIE timing, GNSS-INS fusion and quantum-sensor models. The agent calls the real, externally-validated engine instead of guessing the math. Requires the kshana-mcp server on PATH (cargo install kshana-mcp) or Docker.

entry.title: claude-flow
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: ulm
entry.content: 現場の勘所を育てる『生もの』の長期記憶レイヤー。観測は追記、状態は上書き+TTL、仮説は inbox で育てて人間の承認で project の skill へ昇格する。CLAUDE.md / ref / beads の次に来るメタ観測事実レイヤー。

entry.title: designer-skills
entry.content: Design-process skills for Claude Code: briefs, information architecture, design tokens, design review, frontend design, and more.

entry.title: framedash
entry.content: Analyze your game telemetry with Claude Code. Bundles the Framedash MCP server (read-only analytics tools), a SQL query cookbook over the events schema, CLI usage patterns, and perf-diff CI recipes.

entry.title: feature-status-tracker
entry.content: Turns a Markdown feature table — or a raw feature list — into an autonomous dev pipeline: clarify each feature, then develop one branch + one PR per feature until the table is done. Works in English or French.

entry.title: theloopskill
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow orchestration for Claude Code: pipeline/parallel/loop patterns with harness & loop engineering policies, plus skills for security code review, system/architecture design, and project orchestration with per-task model routing.

entry.title: sofar-asset-intake
entry.content: Drop in a marketing asset (URL, pasted text, or file) and file it into the right Sofar Notion databases: catalogue it in the Resource Library, extract customer quotes into the Customer Testimonials Repository, surface any new featureable statistics into the Statistics Repository, and, for Spotter customer stories, add them to the Case Study Coverage Map if not already mapped, with duplicate detection before every write, plus the appropriate confirmation and governance.

entry.title: aaronsilinskas-skills
entry.content: aaronsilinskas-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: caliper
entry.content: Run /caliper to launch. Caliper — precision for your AI spend: a local dashboard showing exactly where your Claude Code money goes (sessions, workflows, subagents, machine-wide analytics; cache-aware cost reconstruction), plus /optimize-spend to turn your usage into cost discipline. 100% local, no telemetry.

entry.title: teachme
entry.content: Teach Me — turn any topic into a searchable, themed handbook or study material (reference · practice · narrative chapters · quiz/Q&A) written in the user's language from official sources, quality-verified by a multi-agent harness, and published to GitHub Pages. Invoke with /teachme. Requires Claude Code, git, gh (GitHub CLI); GitHub Pro assumed for private repo + public Pages.

entry.title: promptus
entry.content: A file-based research knowledge system — a substrate for the LLM agent: store / keep / retrieve what a project knows as gated markdown, navigable by status and a [[link]] graph. grannie is the human read-port (plain-language, grounded answers); the humanizer is a bundled style toolkit.

entry.title: claude-writing-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for running a writing publication — interview, outline, draft, coach, edit, source-check, top-edit, repurpose.

entry.title: agentos
entry.content: Companion layer for AI coding agents: review queue delivered when the agent finishes, locked project decisions injected into every prompt. Requires the agentos binary on PATH (cargo install --path crates/agentos-cli, or a release binary).

entry.title: repo-wiki
entry.content: Persistent, agent-maintained repo wiki — the durable state-of-the-repo, not short-term plans. Lives at /wiki/ in the repo root; only the index loads into context, pages are read on demand. Includes bootstrapping/migration and drift-verification guides.

entry.title: tailrocks-skills
entry.content: Tailrocks engineering skills for Claude Code and other agents: strict Rust engineering, project setup, proposal discovery, and research planning

entry.title: demo-video-generator
entry.content: Generates a professional demo video (.mp4) of your SaaS app from a user journey: Playwright captures your screens, Remotion animates them (Ken Burns, highlights, text overlays) — Stripe/Linear product-tour style, no video editor needed.

entry.title: grav-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for working on Grav CMS projects, focused on Grav 2.0 plugin development against the API and Admin Next architectures.

entry.title: judgment
entry.content: Access Judgment traces, sessions, behaviors, judges, prompts, datasets, and tests directly from your AI coding tool, with official skills for tracing, evaluation, and MCP usage best practices.

entry.title: agmsg
entry.content: Cross-agent messaging via SQLite. Send messages between CLI AI agents. No daemon, no network.

entry.title: cnstudio
entry.content: Drive CnStudio-designed UIs from Claude Code: the studio's MCP tools (components, layers, slots, props, registries) plus a skill teaching the design model and slash commands for common flows. Requires the CnStudio VS Code extension running with the project open.

entry.title: harness-humanizer
entry.content: Removes AI-slop from prose (empty hedging, listicle stems, smooth transitions, generic filler) and rewrites toward a real point of view — without trading AI-slop for louder slop. Self-scores against an embedded rubric, flags hollow spans instead of fabricating, and reports rather than overwrites. Portable to every AI tool via generated adapters; ships a zero-dependency CLI flagger.

entry.title: cad-claude-plugin
entry.content: Co-facilitador de descoberta aumentada (CAD): escaneia fontes, extrai fatos com evidência rastreável e sintetiza artefatos fiéis a Lean Inception e DDD sobre um substrato neutro.

entry.title: claude-coat
entry.content: Give Claude Code a fresh coat — 16 hand-tuned themes mapped across all 62 color tokens.

entry.title: supered
entry.content: Set up and manage a Supered environment with Claude. Connects the Supered MCP, then guides creating collections, content, guides, page triggers, process boards, sync-engine rules/rulesets, and action plans — following Supered best practices.

entry.title: solution-harness-plugin
entry.content: 앱팀 공통 harness-engineering 워크플로우 플러그인 V2 (Android / iOS) — 계획→TDD→검증→bug-fix 닫힌 루프

entry.title: neural-seam
entry.content: Adapter de host Claude Code do Neural Seam: registra o MCP server neural-seam-runtime, os hooks de lifecycle e os comandos /neural-seam:ns-*. Requer o binario `neural-seam` no PATH (instalador/one-liner) e um projeto conectado via `neural-seam login` + `neural-seam connect`.

entry.title: codex-orchestrator
entry.content: Orchestrate OpenAI Codex from Claude: delegate implementation work in supervised checkpoint slices with server-enforced quality gates, persistent plans/hypotheses, worktree isolation and per-task model/effort control.

entry.title: career-skills
entry.content: Career ladders, hiring job descriptions, and canonical role records built on the Open Capability Framework — generate a ladder for any role, or mint a stable canonical role others can reuse.

entry.title: go
entry.content: Go development patterns, DevOps tooling, microservices, and CLI frameworks

entry.title: ship
entry.content: Git and release: /commit, /checkout, /pr, /issue with conventional commits and PR generation

entry.title: instantsearch
entry.content: Build production-quality search experiences (autocomplete, search results pages, faceted search) using InstantSearch with React, Vue, or vanilla JS. Covers discovery, implementation, styling, and review with expert guidance on widget selection, styling approaches, mobile overlays, and common anti-patterns. Do NOT use for backend index operations — use algolia-cli. Do NOT use for analytics or recommendations — use algolia-mcp. Do NOT use for AI/agent/conversational search — use algobot-cli.

entry.title: verification-validation-and-test
entry.content: Author custom Model Advisor checks and run compliance reviews against industry standards (MISRA, MAB, ISO 26262, DO-178C, AUTOSAR)

entry.title: agi-super-team
entry.content: Virtual C-Suite of AI executives powered by legendary minds, with 1,651 skills

entry.title: poki
entry.content: A vulnerability harness for Claude Code. Turns the agent into an adversarial security auditor that runs a six-phase, multi-agent pipeline (recon, hunt, validate, report, structured output, independent verification) to find exploitable vulnerabilities with real impact.

entry.title: pam-core
entry.content: Multi-agent skill framework for project understanding, orchestration, security and quality gates.

entry.title: forecasting
entry.content: Project Economico's future state — cash, runway, MRR/ARR, and committed inflows/outflows — by running what-ifs and forward-dated draft entries inside disposable planning scenarios, so reports show base + scenario and the real ledger stays untouched.

entry.title: mode-marketing-ua
entry.content: Mode Marketing's AI creative toolkit — 15 HyperFrames skills that turn a plain-English brief into a finished marketing video. Install once, then just describe the video you want.

entry.title: lovision
entry.content: Skill and MCP configuration for Lovision. Teaches external agents the canonical session-first Lovision MCP workflow for creating, editing, checking, previewing, exporting, and handing off native Lovision designs.

entry.title: microsoft-365-mcp
entry.content: Multi-account, token-efficient MCP for Outlook mail + Calendar + OneDrive via Microsoft Graph. 33 tools, Keychain-backed tokens.

entry.title: plan-review
entry.content: Review and iterate on Claude's plans using inline browser comments instead of linear chat.

entry.title: senior-fable
entry.content: Tech-lead orchestration mode: the top-tier model keeps architecture and decisions, cheap subagents do the routine and the digging. Save tokens without losing quality.

entry.title: ui-craft
entry.content: Design engineering skill + system for AI coding agents: anti-slop UI, outcome recipes, spec-driven design, design-review + a11y agents, MCP quality gates.

entry.title: loom
entry.content: Loom — meta-orchestration platform for Claude Code. Plans, executes, reviews, and tests software changes with multi-agent pipelines, hook-enforced contracts, and a pull-on-demand library.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: sf-intelligence
entry.content: MCP-first, offline-first hybrid knowledge base for a Salesforce org. Resolve-first routing, coverage-aware destructive verdicts, opt-in live read-only plane. Ask sfi.capabilities for the live tool map.

entry.title: persona-lab
entry.content: A multi-persona operating model for single-human-driven autonomous SDLC.

entry.title: atl
entry.content: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: unified-bug-hunter
entry.content: Scope-safe, memory-backed bug-bounty & red-team plugin for Claude Code — 89 skills, 45 commands, 31 agents, and 6 MCP servers that orchestrate real offensive tooling (subfinder/httpx/nuclei/dalfox/sqlmap/Foundry) with distilled methodology, false-positive discipline, a deterministic fail-closed scope checker, and cross-target pattern learning. Skills auto-load by topic; reports never auto-submit.

entry.title: todos
entry.content: Per-project todo tracking with a relational project-knowledge brain — decisions, business rules, contradictions, stakeholders, scope changes — and a local broadsheet dashboard at localhost:5757. Plan, sync, build, design, and close out implementation work; capture decisions/rules/contradictions to remember later.

entry.title: abu-context-engineering
entry.content: Research-first context engineering workflows for Claude Code and Codex, including prototype reintegration and goal prompts before implementation planning.

entry.title: oats-skills
entry.content: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entry.title: sota-skills
entry.content: State-of-the-art engineering skills (2026) for building and auditing software across 36 domains and languages — security, architecture, APIs, databases, cloud, Kubernetes, observability, testing, LLM engineering, UX writing, copywriting, and more — with a master router and BUILD/AUDIT modes (37 skills).

entry.title: odoo-ai-skills
entry.content: The local-first verification & deploy gate for AI-written Odoo 17/18/19 changes — static indexes suggest; this verifies against the running instance. Read ground truth from the live instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Layer-K discovery solves the cold-start problem — rank the live entrypoint surface (buttons/crons/automations/routes), sample the real cross-app flow as an Execution Surface Graph, measure hallucination reduction against a benchmark, and ENFORCE no-introspect-no-edit via a PreToolUse hook. Layer-I enforcement gates turn that evidence into proof: risk-based scenario test generation, dev-vs-prod environment parity, a static anti-pattern validator, enforced privacy redaction, an upgrade/migration harness, a deploy approval gate, a one-command evidence bundle (PR-comment verdict), and a bring-your-own-index claim verifier; plus a local Odoo developer-docs index (Layer J). No SaaS, no seats, no metadata leaves the box. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entry.title: t-tools
entry.content: DDD-driven development skills, sub-agents and workflow commands for Rust + React projects

entry.title: stageset
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate StageSet resources for the stageset-controller — ordered, gated, multi-stage Flux delivery.

entry.title: unlok
entry.content: Unlok investment copilot for portfolio intelligence, market thesis research, and execution-safe trade workflows.

entry.title: flow-skills
entry.content: The Fused _core management skills as a Claude Code plugin: read/write the App state store (tasks, runs, feedback cards, secrets, agent roster, artifact chats) through the live _core workspace UDFs over `fused dev serve`. Each skill is self-contained. Load with `claude --plugin-dir <path-to-this-repo>`.

entry.title: skval
entry.content: Skill Validator Framework — score a Claude Code skill against evals and benchmarks and get a ship/revise/reject verdict.

entry.title: erikpr1994-materialize
entry.content: erikpr1994-materialize — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ospec-workflow
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development workflow for VS Code Agent Customization with OpenSpec, strict TDD, phase agents, skills, hooks, and verification contracts.

entry.title: misfire
entry.content: Tells you which of your existing CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules prose rules your agents demonstrably ignore, ranked from your own run history, and scaffolds a deterministic hook for the violated convertible subset — keeping safety rules as prose. Deterministic, zero-LLM, observer-only: never auto-deletes, never auto-applies, never writes settings.json.

entry.title: gooseworks
entry.content: 100+ data tools for scraping, research, lead generation, and enrichment. Search Twitter/X, Reddit, LinkedIn, find emails, enrich companies, and more — all from your coding agent.

entry.title: afk-issues
entry.content: Work tracker issues to reviewed GitHub pull requests. afk-issues runs a batch unattended; grab-issue takes a single issue supervised. GitHub by default; pluggable to Jira and others via a repo adapter doc. Both skills dispatch the issue-worker agent.

entry.title: planwright
entry.content: Autopilot for spec-driven development. The human signs off and merges; planwright flies the spec.

entry.title: ai-handoff
entry.content: Automatic, integrity-checked handoff and verified memory recall between Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: ledger
entry.content: Execution as Proof for money — the deterministic correctness layer AI agents call. Exact Money.from (no floats), kernel-enforced double-entry via JournalEntry + validateEntry + Ledger.apply, audit-hashed ledgers, canon citations. Provides /ledger-* skills and slash commands.

entry.title: vts-local-orchestrator
entry.content: Delegate cheap code-location to ANY local LLM (Ollama, full-GPU) that drives vs-token-safer's vs-search tools — so Claude spends its tokens on reasoning, not raw search output. Model-agnostic (default gemma4:e4b). Ships the qvts CLI, a live web dashboard with a 3-way token-savings panel, and an auto-loading delegation-routing skill.

entry.title: sparq
entry.content: Usage skills for the sparq RDF triplestore + SPARQL 1.1/1.2 engine (Rust/CLI/HTTP/Python/WASM + reasoning, SHACL, full-text, vector, GeoSPARQL, RSP-QL, ZK query proofs).

entry.title: plur
entry.content: Persistent, local-first shared memory for AI agents. Corrections, preferences, and conventions persist across sessions, tools, and machines — stored as plain YAML on your disk, with zero-cost local search.

entry.title: freeflow
entry.content: Lightweight workflow for coding agents. Conversation, workflow, and strict-workflow skills for planning, execution, review, verification, handoff, and decision capture.

entry.title: agent-swarm
entry.content: Orchestration skill: make the current session a controller that spawns Codex/Claude/Hermes worker agents in tmux, tracks them in a TSV registry, tails logs, sends input, and reviews output.

entry.title: edator
entry.content: Record once. Claude makes the edit decisions, FFmpeg executes them. An AI co-producer that cuts your raw footage into a finished video — deterministically.

entry.title: memor-re
entry.content: Installable memor.re Council and product-operating workflows for Claude Code.

entry.title: claude-status-bar
entry.content: Menu bar status indicator for Claude Code: animated spark, elapsed timer, and open/close lifecycle.

entry.title: grimoire
entry.content: Grimoire — a composing suite of Agent Skills distilling the R-Ladies guide (guide.rladies.org) into on-demand spells for the community and global team: apply the R-Ladies brand and voice, write and translate blog posts, draft and schedule social media, coordinate abstract review, run chapters and events, maintain the website, and run pre-human-review checks the R-Ladies way.

entry.title: patina
entry.content: Detect and rewrite AI writing patterns in Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese so text reads as if a human wrote it. Meaning-preservation (MPS) verified, audit-friendly. The root SKILL.md is loaded as the /patina skill.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: eidos
entry.content: Spec-driven development plugin for Claude Code. Markdown specs as the source of truth, code downstream.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: claudeclaw2
entry.content: Multi-channel bridge for Claude Code: per-channel tmux-hosted agents driven by Telegram / Discord / Slack / LINE

entry.title: laravel-vue-superpowers
entry.content: Laravel + Vue 3 (Composition API) + Inertia v3 + Reka UI + Tailwind CSS 4 + Pest 4 + Scout/Meilisearch specialist toolkit for Claude Code. 10 specialist agents, 7 stack-enhanced skills, 13 enforcement & context hooks, 1 slash command. Every specialist verifies APIs against the installed vendor/ (or node_modules/) source — ground truth, not docs.

entry.title: yaml-to-html
entry.content: Two skills that turn a document, repo summary, PR/diff, README, design note, or spec into an offline HTML explainer bundle. generate-explainer-yaml captures meaning (core.yaml) + presentation strategy (view.yaml); generate-explainer-html builds a light/dark bundle whose right pane switches between additive iframe views, with copyable prompts that ask a local-file-reading AI to add more views.

entry.title: learn-skills
entry.content: Agent skills that package evidence-backed pedagogical methodologies (explain-and-check, quiz-me, connect-to-what-you-know, ask-me-questions, learn-by-doing, linked-notes, flashcards) as workflows applied to code. The anti-cognitive-surrender layer: closes the comprehension gap that opens when an LLM has done the work on the human's behalf.

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: mtrojer
entry.content: Personal Claude Code plugin: agent-attention tmux integration and the shared dotfiles skills suite (commit, brainstorm, plan, council, caveman, summarize, tmux, and friends).

entry.title: problem-based-srs
entry.content: Problem-Based Software Requirements Specification methodology for AI-assisted requirements engineering. Provides structured approach to capture Customer Problems (WHY), Customer Needs (WHAT), and Functional Requirements (HOW) with full traceability.

entry.title: brand-content-design
entry.content: Create branded visual content (presentations, carousels, infographics, HTML pages) with Aaker personality-driven design, style recommendation engine, visual components, 26 visual styles, design systems, and Presentation Zen principles

entry.title: ecommerce-observations
entry.content: Live ride-along recorder/reporter for ecommerce shopping. Observes your real browsing session (or drives it yourself in --drive mode) across the funnel (landing → search → category → PDP → cart → checkout), capturing flow, findability, friction, GTM/dataLayer tracking gaps, WebMCP agent-readiness, and named patterns (B2C and B2B/B2B2C) with fast quick-mark notes, then synthesizes a dive report with a visual funnel storyboard.

entry.title: portable-ai-skills
entry.content: Portable AI skills plus Jarad Pack and Dot workspace personal skill snapshots

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: firefox-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Control Firefox for browsing, web testing, and debugging. Fill forms, capture network and console activity, take screenshots, run scripts, and profile performance. Supports Android devices.

entry.title: outset
entry.content: Create, edit, and launch Outset research studies and query interview results — connects to Outset's remote MCP server (OAuth login with your Outset account).

entry.title: software-engineer
entry.content: Multi-agent Claude Code plugin that automates the full software development lifecycle — database → backend → frontend → testing → security scan → git commit. Each domain agent keeps its own knowledge base and learns across sessions. Uses the host IDE's models (orchestrator on the main model, mechanical sub-agents on cheaper models); no API keys or local Ollama required.

entry.title: tetsu-skills
entry.content: A collection of Claude Code skills by tetsuro.

entry.title: genius-skills
entry.content: Personal agent skills for PR review, commits, debugging, and more

entry.title: compliance-support
entry.content: A Claude Code plugin for engineers who write PCI cardholder-data code. It blocks hardcoded secrets and weak crypto as the code is written, and reviews changed code for PII in logs and money-moving actions with no audit trail when the turn ends.

entry.title: cursor-bridge
entry.content: MCP server: 从 Claude Code 直驱 Cursor IDE 的 agent 做语义代码检索（CDP 直驱，无 console 注入）。

entry.title: seeks
entry.content: Self-running, verifier-gated loops with durable .seeks/ state and native worktrees.

entry.title: for-developers-plugin
entry.content: A friendly companion for getting an app running on the Intility Developer Platform. Helps you create a cluster, deploy a containerized app, expose it on a URL, and update it later — without needing prior Kubernetes experience.

entry.title: 1ai-skills
entry.content: 1320 production-ready AI agent skills — cybersecurity, SEO, trading, marketing, automation, devops, content, financial services, and more

entry.title: nicopowers
entry.content: Nico's personal engineering-process skills: brainstorming, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, verification, code review, git worktrees, and skill authoring.

entry.title: todomaker
entry.content: Manage TodoMaker project todos from Claude Code: check pending tasks for the current repo, add tasks and projects. Bundles the TodoMaker MCP server (auto-registered on install) and a usage skill.

entry.title: mad
entry.content: mad (MultiAgent Decanting) — orquestração multi-agente em modo decanting nativo do Claude Code. O Arquiteto coordena especialistas via Agent tool (sem claude -p, sem processos em background); cada feature é uma sessão viva que externaliza aprendizado obrigatoriamente ao fim (decanting). Memória institucional em arquivo, trust ladder por agente, guardrails proporcionais ao blast radius, dashboard HTML local cross-platform e telemetria OpenTelemetry GenAI. Thin wrapper sobre Claude Code: Windows nativo, macOS e Linux.

entry.title: hypo
entry.content: LLM-native personal wiki system — session-aware knowledge base for Claude Code

entry.title: skillbooks
entry.content: AI-executed skills for logged-in site access (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Reddit, Airbnb, Otter, and more), travel and award search, editorial review, and source-cited research.

entry.title: autoharness
entry.content: Per-symbol maintenance optimizer for an agent's skill layer — learns skills from real runs and keeps them by adherence in use, not by an offline eval score.

entry.title: seyfert
entry.content: Source-verified Seyfert v5 guidance for building Discord bots with Claude Code & Codex

entry.title: iterate-team
entry.content: agent team 並列マルチエージェント・ハーネス。要望文から計画を作成し、独立タスクを git worktree で分離して並列実装、検収は Evaluator 先行→APPROVED 後に Code Review の逐次ゲート、PR を自動作成する。言語・スタック非依存。

entry.title: beaver
entry.content: Skills for product definition, system design, software architecture, specs, and verification — structure before code. Bundles defining-products, designing-systems, architecting-software, specifying-features, crafting-code, and verifying-completion.

entry.title: coding-crew
entry.content: A collection of coding skills for project structure, testing, API layers, and design workflows.

entry.title: hse-core
entry.content: NZ/AU workplace health & safety Claude Agent Skills — an orchestrator plus specialists for critical risk, governance, NZ/AU duties, high-risk work, investigation and procedures, and prosecution learning; a full tier of hazard subject-matter experts; equipment/plant specialists (cranes, forklifts, lifting & rigging, EWPs, scaffolding, pressure equipment); and sector specialists spanning construction, transport & logistics, manufacturing, food processing, agriculture, horticulture, forestry, electricity supply, geothermal, oil & gas, mining & quarrying, fishing & aquaculture, maritime & ports, healthcare, waste & recycling, rail, hospitality and more.

entry.title: dependabot-reviewer
entry.content: Review, verify, and fix open Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts you are authenticated with. Approves safe updates, sets automerge, updates branches, flags PRs requiring manual action, and autonomously fixes merge conflicts and failing CI.

entry.title: second-opinion
entry.content: Interrogates the decisions behind AI-written code, not just its correctness: whether this was the right path, whether the business logic is sound, and what it will cost to own. Produces a decision review for a human, or a machine-readable verdict for an approving agent.

entry.title: claude-agent-team
entry.content: Subagents, slash commands, and Unity game-development skills for Claude Code. The Unity skills cover C# architecture, the Editor MCP feedback loop, testing, asset/serialization safety, performance, UI Toolkit, and builds.

entry.title: delivery-graph
entry.content: Delivery Graph Engineering: turn demands into validated delivery graphs. Ships the /dge-* skills and the dge CLI.

entry.title: hotwire-codex-skills
entry.content: Unofficial skillset inspired by The Rails and Hotwire Codex (by Ayush Newatia), published with the author's permission. Skills and runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps that ship to web/PWA, iOS, and Android. Unique vs other Rails plugins (which are LLM coders/reviewers): every skill ships a deterministic, CI-runnable linter that flags the failures that produce no error. Covers Hotwire Native bridge components and path config (cross-platform web+iOS+Android), Rails 7→8 upgrade with the LazyRouteSet route-test flake detector, Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames with a dangling-target / duplicate-id linter, targeted Turbo Streams with a broadcast-eavesdropping linter, DB-backed token session auth with a security audit, and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.

entry.title: delphin
entry.content: Duplex companion for AI agent CLIs — keep talking while the agent thinks, and recall every conversation. Skill: recall Delphin's local memory, or build/run the wrapper.

entry.title: ego-avatar
entry.content: Kaiju Ego Avatar: Token-saving AI persona with Gluttony and Aura skills

entry.title: plumb-line
entry.content: Give any repository the discipline of epistemic honesty enforced by tooling: a clear source-truth layer, visible uncertainty, quarantined fakery, reproducible outputs, and rules enforced by machines rather than goodwill.

entry.title: unihttp
entry.content: Skills for writing idiomatic unihttp clients and generating typed unihttp client packages (SDKs)

entry.title: beantr
entry.content: Manage a personal coffee inventory, brew log, recipes, and recommendations through Markdown files instead of an API or database.

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: trivy-plugin-vdr-skills
entry.content: Agent skills that generate the operator-attested ConfigMaps consumed by trivy-plugin-vdr for FedRAMP VDR/VER: cluster dataflow capture (internet-reachability taint graph) and asset-archetype/Class attestations.

entry.title: vibefullness
entry.content: Always-on output discipline: every response cheap to read and cheap to verify. Composes with caveman.

entry.title: pdd
entry.content: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entry.title: claude-code-themes
entry.content: Accessible, OKLCH-built color themes for Claude Code — tuned for readable contrast and easy on the eyes.

entry.title: operator-user-docs
entry.content: Claude Code skills for generating, branding (OKD), and validating OpenShift operator user-facing documentation

entry.title: ai-mentor
entry.content: Describe your engineering problem, get the right AI workflow. Ranked, verified recommendations with ready-to-paste prompts that teach you why each approach works — not just how.

entry.title: consulting-os
entry.content: Skills for running an AI consulting practice operating system.

entry.title: spreadx-matrix
entry.content: Operate a SpreadX account from your agent — balance, orders, follow & like/retweet/comment plans, plan tracking, and redeeming credits for subscriptions — via the spreadx MCP server, with a dry-run→confirm safety protocol.

entry.title: delegate-team
entry.content: Agentic engineering supersystem — install once, run /mavis-ship "<task>" or dt run "<task>" anywhere. Bundles the /mavis-ship orchestrator, multi-agent team framework, skill scaffolder, agent-kernel (memory + governance), and four companion frameworks (superpowers, Waza, unslop-preflight, autoresearch) on top of the original dt gateway CLI.

entry.title: fpp-forecast
entry.content: Zaman serisi tahminlemesini 'Forecasting: Principles and Practice, the Pythonic Way' metodolojisiyle yapar. Teşhis-önce, kıyas-zorunlu, nokta+aralık. Paralel mimari: orkestratör + isimli agent'lar (teşhisçi, model-işçisi fan-out, birleştirici). Çıktı: çalıştırılabilir .ipynb + Türkçe sonuç raporu.

entry.title: soapbox-agent
entry.content: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entry.title: fabric-skills
entry.content: Complete bundle: all Microsoft Skills for Fabric for developers and consumers

entry.title: pact-kit
entry.content: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 16 instructions, 20 slash commands, 1 security agent, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

entry.title: wikify
entry.content: Turn a folder of documents into a navigable, evidence-grounded wiki, with corpus and wiki MCP search tools.

entry.title: daisyui
entry.content: Official daisyUI component library skill. The mandatory UI library for Tailwind CSS. TRIGGER when generating any HTML or JSX code even if the user does not explicitly ask for this skill.

entry.title: luminaries
entry.content: Paired-thinker review lenses for design review and code audit. Each pair fuses two software-engineering thinkers into one stereo lens held in tension on an axis (e.g. structure × runtime); aim it at a design, spec, PR, diff, or repo. Routes by subject, stage, and intent; runs as a single best-fit pair, a multi-pair panel that fans out one lens per axis and collates, or a single-luminary anchor lookup.

entry.title: arboretum
entry.content: Choreography for AI-assisted software development. Defers heavy lifting to specialists like superpowers; provides governance, workflows, and templates that produce maintainable projects.

entry.title: fusebase-flow
entry.content: The framework client-facing teams use to build internal and client apps with AI. Two agents (Product Owner + AI Developer) run a disciplined spec-to-deploy lifecycle, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills. Closes the gaps that break real AI app development: drift, context rot, scope creep, unreliable hand-offs.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Personal development workflow for Claude Code: 8-step skill chain from ideation to shipping (ideate → product-plan → dev-plan → prototype → implement → qa → update-docs → ship), plus a task skill for small changes on shipped products, a next-step recommender, handoff, zoom-out, reusable subagents, and shared global rules.

entry.title: bigid
entry.content: The BigID plugin includes the official BigID MCP connector with a set of optimized skills to help explore, manage, and action your data

entry.title: author-workflow
entry.content: Teach a shell-capable agent (Claude Code or Codex) to author a dynamic multi-agent workflow at runtime — a Starlark program over the harness runtime — and run it with `harness workflow run-script`. Bundles the author-workflow skill from skills/.

entry.title: basemind
entry.content: Full AI context layer over MCP — tree-sitter code-map, document RAG (PDF/Office/HTML/email + OCR + reranker), shared agent memory, on-demand web crawl, git history + blame + per-symbol diff. 300+ languages, 10+ coding-agent harnesses, content-addressed Fjall + LanceDB.

entry.title: dudelis-skills
entry.content: dudelis-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: herdr-pm
entry.content: The socket-native herdr-pm engine + three role skills: a CEO that puts a manager beside every active agent pane and supervises the fleet, a manager that dispatches plan-first workers and verifies every 'done' with real evidence, and the worker lane discipline — all driven by one stdlib Python file over herdr's protocol-15 socket API.

entry.title: vatt-ghern
entry.content: Daily tech news skill for the vatt-ghern public blog (Eleventy + Cloudflare Pages). Drafts one roundup + several deep-story HTML posts per day, opens a PR for review.

entry.title: promptworld
entry.content: PromptWorld — the meta-compiler *World: a WrightMaster Engineer-CEO that has every skill plus a native subagent per component type (skill / mcp / harness / operating_system / prompt / team / workflow), and 7 PromptGym specialist AIOS agents, that compile / compose / publish prompt systems through the nomicon. Bundles the install-promptworld deploy WIZARD (the agent builds the docker image, boots the container running the Engineer-CEO + PromptGym + the assistant-ui chat / Monaco file explorer / embedded terminal, copies the Claude creds in, and hands the user one URL), compile-a-world (the meta-compiler skill — the nomicon folds on itself), and ingest-into-nomicon-app.

entry.title: techne
entry.content: A curated skills plugin for practical AI-era craft, judgment, and delivery.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: interactive-diagram
entry.content: Build beautiful, interactive technical diagrams (system / architecture / sequence / flow) as a single self-contained HTML file — pure HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS, no build step. Tabbed multi-view, pan / zoom / drag, connected-chain highlight, double-click pin, dark mode (Tokyo Night), overlap auto-fix, and SVG / PNG export. Plus a static, slide-ready platform-architecture poster mode with a built-in overflow / overlap audit, one-click auto-fix, and download-fixed-HTML.

entry.title: production-readiness
entry.content: Comprehensive production readiness audit — 75+ checks across 9 pillars: security & supply chain, visual QA, code quality, testing, error handling & observability, build, performance, accessibility (WCAG 2.2), and AI/LLM safety. Like having a senior engineer + QA tester do a final review before deploy.

entry.title: fosmvvm-generators
entry.content: FOSMVVM architecture generators for ViewModels, Fields, DataModels, ServerRequests, Leaf Views, and ViewModel Tests

entry.title: discover
entry.content: Methodical 5-pass feature-discovery workflow on Claude Code's built-in Workflow engine: system mapping, bounded research, evidence-rule kill-testing, plan tournament, verified execution. No required dependencies; OMC/superpowers/Codex/Gemini are optional boosters.

entry.title: sdna
entry.content: SDNA (Sanctuary DNA) - Gnostic agent workflow DSL with skills for chain development

entry.title: truto
entry.content: Official plugin for Truto -- the unified API platform. Helps developers integrate with third-party tools using Truto's APIs.

entry.title: workmux-status
entry.content: Display Claude agent status in tmux window names via workmux

entry.title: saferun-guard
entry.content: Runtime safety firewall for AI coding agents. Blocks dangerous commands and protects sensitive files before they execute.

entry.title: openclaw-docs
entry.content: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entry.title: polygram
entry.content: Telegram integration for Claude Code that preserves the OpenClaw per-chat session model. Migration target for OpenClaw users. Multi-bot, multi-chat, per-topic isolation; SQLite transcripts; inline-keyboard approvals. Bundles /polygram:status|logs|pair-code|approvals admin commands plus history (transcript queries) and polygram-send (out-of-turn IPC sends with file-upload validation) skills.

entry.title: bd
entry.content: Agent skills for the bitdrift Capture mobile observability platform

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Public OllyGarden AI skills for Rose and the broader ecosystem

entry.title: bopen-tools
entry.content: Development agents, skills, hooks, and commands for Claude Code workflows

entry.title: workflow-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for general engineering workflows: collaborative PR review, durable multi-step planning, auditable quantitative analysis pipelines with independent fact-checking, and a repo-native task loop for capturing and processing follow-up work.

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: dev-pomogator
entry.content: Team coding standards and workflows for Claude Code: skills (create-spec, run-tests, plan-pomogator, etc.), rules, hooks, and MCP servers — distributed via canonical Anthropic marketplace.

entry.title: swe-workbench
entry.content: Senior-engineer toolkit: principled design (Clean Arch, DDD, SOLID, TDD, patterns, observability, concurrency), security review, language expertise (Bash, C#, Go, Java, Kotlin, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Swift, TypeScript), and pragmatic workflows.

entry.title: eigenflux
entry.content: EigenFlux broadcast network channel for Claude Code — feed polling, PM streaming, and skills for agent-to-agent signals.

entry.title: epic
entry.content: 3 commands + 19 auto-trigger skills + self-evolving agent harness. Less to remember, more automation.

entry.title: wb-plc
entry.content: Wiren Board controller skills — operate, configure, troubleshoot WB hardware via SSH and wb-cli.

entry.title: squid
entry.content: Opinionated engineering agent team with progressive-disclosure specs for Python / TypeScript / Go monorepos. Ships PA / SWE / Tester / PR Reviewer / On-Call sub-agents, /squid-plan / /squid-implement-task / /squid-implement-night pipelines, and a library of language/framework/infra specs that agents load on-demand.

entry.title: camunda-migration
entry.content: Claude Code skills for migrating Camunda 7 projects to Camunda 8

entry.title: mergify
entry.content: Skills for the Mergify CLI: manage merge queues, stacked pull requests, Test Insights (flaky tests, quarantine), merge protections, and Mergify configuration directly from the terminal.

entry.title: insane-search
entry.content: Platform-specific access strategies for AI agents — adaptively accesses blocked sites (X/Twitter, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Naver, Coupang, LinkedIn) without API keys. Phase 0→3 adaptive scheduler with curl_cffi TLS impersonation and auto dependency install.

entry.title: dev-pipeline
entry.content: Multi-agent development pipeline simulating an engineering team: requirements analysis, technical design, module breakdown, TDD implementation, validation, code review, and fix cycles

entry.title: yutori
entry.content: Web monitoring (Scouts), deep research, and browser automation

entry.title: scriptorium
entry.content: Self-evolving agent layer for Claude Code. Armarium (persistence & sync), Scribe (self-authoring), and Corrector (self-review) tend a Canon-defined instance. Bring your own instance, or run `/scriptorium-init` to set one up.

entry.title: vergil
entry.content: Shared hooks, skills, agents, and commands for all managed repositories in the vergil-tooling ecosystem.

entry.title: claude-plugin-security-risk
entry.content: Educational security demo — 23 post-install attack scenarios. See SAFETY.md before installing.

entry.title: hiivmind-corpus
entry.content: Meta-plugin for creating documentation corpus skills - index and navigate any open source project docs

entry.title: agentic-sls
entry.content: Agentic process optimization for selective laser sintering (SLS) additive manufacturing.

entry.title: memex-garden
entry.content: Search and save content in your Memex library through the hosted Memex MCP server and bundled memex-agent-skill.

entry.title: oh-my-claudeagent
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Specialist agents handle planning, execution, code review, debugging, and research with evidence-based verification.

entry.title: ai-maestro-maintainer-agent
entry.content: MAINTAINER role-plugin for AI Maestro. Polls a GitHub repository for new issues, triages bugs, and fixes valid issues autonomously via clone-branch-test-publish workflow.

entry.title: dataproc
entry.content: Manage Dataproc clusters and jobs.

entry.title: huhhb
entry.content: Uhstray.io skills marketplace — curated Claude Code skills including uhh:memory.

entry.title: timebase
entry.content: TimeBase plugin

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: hackartist-plugins
entry.content: Core skills library for Hackartist Claude Code

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: stack-nudge
entry.content: Notifications for AI coding agents — banners + sounds when Claude finishes or pauses for permission

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.
